summary.verdict: THIN MARKET — honest. After two thorough sweeps (round-1 = 27) + ~163 lifetime applications, the genuinely-new, eligible, fitting, live pool is small. 5 clean new roles found; all others swept were already-submitted/staged dups, senior/people-mgmt seniority, overseas, contract/LTE, comp/payroll/ERG-primary, or non-sponsoring. Quality over volume per Rule-6.
biggest_dedup_catches: Twitch — Program Manager, Culture & People Development (Greenhouse 8582338002) = ALREADY SUBMITTED 2026-06-13 (run feed-first). Would have been the top 'new' find; excluded.
PSU — Senior Specialist, Training & Employee Development (jobs.hrc.pdx.edu/postings/49997) = ALREADY STAGED 2026-06-13 (blocked on security question). Excluded.
OSU — Academic Advising Specialist + Academic Advisor/Coordinator Pool + Scholarship Program Coordinator = all 3 ALREADY STAGED tonight (in prompt dedup list). Excluded.

sources_swept_round2: Greenhouse public API — ~90 boards (tech/EdTech/healthtech/fintech/people-tech). Most 404 (wrong token) or returned senior/overseas/dup roles.
Lever public API — ~26 boards. Palantir People Partner (NYC/DC) only non-dup hit (defense-adjacent, ITAR-risk).
Ashby public API — ~40 boards. Notion/Sierra/OpenAI/Cohere/Crusoe hits = senior, overseas, or already-tracked.

Cap-exempt PNW careers LIVE in-browser (CDP 9333 own tab): PSU PeopleAdmin (LIVE, richest vein), OSU PageUp (LIVE, all relevant roles already staged), U of Oregon PageUp (LIVE), UW (board down — new system launches Aug 18 2026), Providence/Kaiser (404/cookie-walled).
PNW NGO/foundation: Mercy Corps Jobvite (LIVE — mostly overseas field roles), Gates Foundation Workday (LIVE — senior/overseas/LTE only), Casey Family (JS-walled), Idealist (JS-walled to WebFetch).

LinkedIn saved + recommended feed: NOT reachable — port 9333 Chrome is NOT logged into LinkedIn this run. Round-1 sibling agent already harvested 41 saved + 216 recommended; feed considered tapped for tonight. FLAGGED.

roles.title: Student Services Coordinator
roles.live_verified: true (CDP own-tab 2026-06-14; JD body read; no no-sponsor / no ITAR text)
roles.sponsorship: cap-exempt (PSU university; board carries an active 'Notice of Intent to Hire E-3 Employee' = PSU does hire visa/international employees — positive willingness signal, though E-3 is AUS-specific; H-1B is cap-exempt-eligible)
roles.fit: Student success / advising-adjacent program coordination: 'enhance the student experience with a focus on retention, program completion, addressing student needs; coordinates accommodated testing; new-student orientation; student engagement.' Direct InGenius educational-program adjacency. Min quals = Bachelor's + only 1+ yr higher-ed + project management + public outreach — LOW YOE bar, Jamie clears it. Cap-exempt = sponsorship-safe.
roles.flags: Salary $55,704 — flag for H-1B prevailing wage; cap-exempt coordinator roles can still clear at this grade but verify. Closes 6/26 — time-sensitive.

roles.title: Program Coordinator, Health Promotion and Wellness Services
roles.live_verified: true (CDP own-tab 2026-06-14; full JD read; no no-sponsor / no ITAR text)
roles.sponsorship: cap-exempt (UO university; willingness verify per posting — UO HR sponsors some OA roles)
roles.fit: Officer-of-Administration program coordination in Student Life (Division of Student Life / University Health Services): 'comprehensive programs and services that promote and advance student learning and success.' Program-mgmt + student-stakeholder + wellness-programming = P1c InGenius adjacency. Classified Planning/Project Management.
roles.competition: cap-exempt; review began 5/20, open until filled (aging but live)
roles.flags: Salary $55,000-$62,000 — flag for H-1B prevailing wage. Eugene relocation (not Portland-local). 'Health promotion/wellness' domain is adjacent, not core People/L&D — honest fit is moderate.

roles.title: Coordinator of Basic Needs Center
roles.live_verified: true (CDP own-tab 2026-06-14; surfaced live on PSU board; JD not deep-read — verify before apply)
roles.sponsorship: cap-exempt (PSU; E-3 hiring-notice present = visa-willingness signal)
roles.fit: Student-support program coordination (basic-needs services = food/housing/resource navigation for students). Community-outreach + program-coordination + student-stakeholder = P1c adjacency. Surface as moderate fit; confirm duties aren't pure case-management (which would be off-sweet-spot).
roles.flags: JD not fully read — verify duties (program-coordination vs 1:1 case-management) + salary/prevailing-wage + sponsorship-willingness before apply. Lower-confidence than the other two PSU/UO roles.

roles.title: Senior Program Manager, Talent & Culture
roles.location: San Francisco / Atlanta / Toronto (remote-friendly within those)
roles.live_verified: true (CDP own-tab 2026-06-14; full JD read; NO no-sponsor clause; ITAR flag was a FALSE POSITIVE — 'itar' matched inside 'veteran/military' in EEO boilerplate, not an export-control clause; form asks the sponsorship question neutrally)
roles.sponsorship: unknown — PagerDuty H-1B/People-LCA pattern NOT verified (myvisajobs landing page gave no data this run). Treat as unknown sponsor = stretch.
roles.fit: Title is sweet-spot (Talent & Culture program ownership, L&D facilitation). BUT two substantive problems: (1) 7+ year ask — Jamie ~3, scoring guardrail caps score <=60 for a 2+yr gap; (2) JD PRIMARY duties = ERG management + Global Belonging programs + cultural heritage months — the RULE-0 'don't relabel ODN/engagement as ERG/belonging program mgmt' trap (same failure mode as Cambia). Jamie lacks hands-on ERG-ownership track record; a truthful resume can't make her a match without relabeling.
roles.flags: Surfaced for completeness/honesty, NOT recommended. 7yr YOE gap + ERG-primary duties (RULE-0 fabrication risk) + unverified sponsor. If pursued, must be via honest framing only; likely below interview bar.

roles.title: Program Officer, Asia (and Assistant Program Officer roles)
roles.location: Washington DC / Portland OR / US-Remote (Eastern Time preferred)
roles.source: WebSearch lead + Mercy Corps Jobvite (live, JS-rendered; specific US role not on featured list at check time)
roles.live_verified: partial — Jobvite board loaded live (CDP own-tab) but is JS-paginated; the Portland/DC/Remote Program Officer (Asia) role surfaced via WebSearch (LinkedIn + Glassdoor) not confirmed on the live board this pass. RE-VERIFY the specific posting before apply.
roles.sponsorship: unknown for US People/program roles — Mercy Corps has INTERNATIONAL mobility infrastructure (NGO) but that does NOT confirm H-1B for a US-HQ Program Officer. Verify per posting.
roles.fit: Major Portland-HQ global-development NGO; Program Officer = program-mgmt + global-partnerships scope = P1c adjacency, and Portland-local/remote-US is in budget. BUT Mercy Corps Program-Officer roles lean international-development-portfolio (donor/grant/field-program mgmt) — honest fit depends on the specific portfolio; not a guaranteed match to Jamie's HR/OD/L&D recipes.
roles.competition: Portland-HQ NGO; 28 PDX-area Mercy Corps jobs live per LinkedIn (mostly field)
roles.flags: Lower-confidence: specific US posting not live-confirmed this pass + sponsor-willingness unverified + portfolio may be development-finance not People. Re-verify the exact posting (and that it's US-based + still open) before tailoring.
